title: Bucktooth Bob Goes to Europe
description: It’s not just the language barrier Bucktooth Bob has to navigate when he visits Europe for the very first time.
quote: The Eiffel Tower? More like He-fell Tower.
altHero: Bucktooth Bob, an American lumberjack type man, looking at a fancy French man walking toward a banana peel on the walkway of the Eiffel Tower
